svg.title: town.c ↔ game.js integration architecture
svg.desc: Diagram showing how game.js connects to the WASM town.c module via memory, proc table, and exported functions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the WASM memory object work in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('How do I get the g_mem pointer from WASM in JavaScript?')

sendPrompt('How do I write the MDT file into WASM memory?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up the g_town_procs function pointer table from JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('How do I call wasm_town_entry_disabling_edge_scroll from JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('How does JavaScript read hero position from WASM memory each frame?')
g.text: 7. Read state → render canvas each frame
flat linear memory, all state lives here
